requirement_topic.en: Nameplate requirements — JIS C 4034 and Top Runner efficiency class marking
requirement_topic.zh: 铭牌要求 — JIS C 4034 及领跑者效率等级标注
requirement_topic.zht: 銘牌要求 — JIS C 4034 及領跑者效率等級標注

summary.en: Motors sold in Japan must carry a nameplate declaring rated output (kW), rated voltage (V), rated frequency (Hz), rated current (A), rated speed (rpm), insulation class, IP protection class, duty type, and efficiency or efficiency class. JIS C 4034-1 specifies the minimum nameplate information for rotating machines. For Top Runner compliance, motors must be able to demonstrate their efficiency class (IE2/IE3 or equivalent Top Runner target) either on the nameplate or in accompanying technical documentation. JIS C 4034-30 defines the efficiency class designations (IE1/IE2/IE3) that should be referenced. There is no mandatory separate energy label (comparable to EU energy label) required for industrial motors in Japan — efficiency compliance is demonstrated through technical documentation rather than a consumer-facing label.
summary.zh: 在日本销售的电机须在铭牌上标注额定输出（kW）、额定电压（V）、额定频率（Hz）、额定电流（A）、额定转速（rpm）、绝缘等级、IP 防护等级、工作制及效率或效率等级。JIS C 4034-1 规定了旋转电机铭牌的最低信息要求。对于领跑者合规，电机须能通过铭牌或随附技术文件证明其效率等级（IE2/IE3 或等效领跑者目标值）。JIS C 4034-30 定义了应引用的效率等级标识（IE1/IE2/IE3）。日本工业电机无需单独的强制性能效标签（类似欧盟能效标签）——效率合规通过技术文件而非面向消费者的标签来证明。
summary.zht: 在日本銷售的電機須在銘牌上標注額定輸出（kW）、額定電壓（V）、額定頻率（Hz）、額定電流（A）、額定轉速（rpm）、絕緣等級、IP 防護等級、工作制及效率或效率等級。JIS C 4034-1 規定了旋轉電機銘牌的最低資訊要求。對於領跑者合規，電機須能通過銘牌或隨附技術文件證明其效率等級（IE2/IE3 或等效領跑者目標值）。JIS C 4034-30 定義了應引用的效率等級標識（IE1/IE2/IE3）。日本工業電機無需單獨的強制性能效標籤（類似歐盟能效標籤）——效率合規通過技術文件而非面向消費者的標籤來證明。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 4034-1 (Nameplate requirements — adoption of IEC 60034-1)
JIS C 4034-30 (Efficiency class designations IE1/IE2/IE3 — adoption of IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (Ed.1, IE1-IE4))
Act on Rationalizing Energy Use (省エネ法) — technical documentation obligations for Top Runner designated products

summary.en: GB 755-2019 specifies nameplate requirements for rotating machines in China, aligned with IEC 60034-1. Chinese motors are required to display rated output, voltage, current, frequency, speed, insulation class, duty, IP class, and efficiency or efficiency grade on the nameplate. GB 18613-2020 additionally requires the energy efficiency grade (1/2/3) to be marked where the motor is subject to the mandatory minimum efficiency standard. The nameplate content requirements under GB 755 and JIS C 4034-1 are very similar due to their common IEC 60034-1 basis.
summary.zh: GB 755-2019 规定了中国旋转电机铭牌要求，与 IEC 60034-1 一致。中国电机须在铭牌上标注额定输出、电压、电流、频率、转速、绝缘等级、工作制、IP 等级及效率或能效等级。GB 18613-2020 还要求在电机适用强制最低能效标准的情况下，于铭牌上标注能效等级（1/2/3 级）。由于均以 IEC 60034-1 为基础，GB 755 与 JIS C 4034-1 的铭牌内容要求非常相似。
summary.zht: GB 755-2019 規定了中國旋轉電機銘牌要求，與 IEC 60034-1 一致。中國電機須在銘牌上標注額定輸出、電壓、電流、頻率、轉速、絕緣等級、工作制、IP 等級及效率或能效等級。GB 18613-2020 還要求在電機適用強制最低能效標準的情況下，於銘牌上標注能效等級（1/2/3 級）。由於均以 IEC 60034-1 為基礎，GB 755 與 JIS C 4034-1 的銘牌內容要求非常相似。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (energy efficiency grade marking on nameplate)

gap.en: Nameplate technical content is closely aligned between GB 755 and JIS C 4034-1 (both derive from IEC 60034-1). Key practical gaps: (1) Language — nameplates in Japan typically display information in Japanese; although JIS C 4034-1 does not mandate a specific language, Japanese buyers and inspectors expect Japanese-language labelling for key parameters. Chinese-language-only nameplates may not be accepted in procurement. (2) Efficiency class notation — GB 18613-2020 uses Grade 1/2/3 (能效等级 1/2/3) while Japan uses IE1/IE2/IE3 notation per JIS C 4034-30; the nameplate or documentation for Japan should declare IE class, not GB grade, or provide a clear cross-reference. (3) Frequency — Japan uses 50 Hz (eastern Japan) and 60 Hz (western Japan); a motor nameplate must correctly state the rated frequency. Chinese-made motors for China are typically 50 Hz only — dual-frequency or 60 Hz variants need separate validation for western Japan. (4) No energy label — Japan does not require the type of visible consumer-facing energy efficiency label mandated for motors in some other markets (EU, Australia); technical documents suffice.
gap.zh: GB 755 与 JIS C 4034-1 的铭牌技术内容高度一致（均源自 IEC 60034-1）。主要实际差距在于：(1) 语言——日本铭牌通常以日语显示信息；尽管 JIS C 4034-1 未强制规定特定语言，但日本买家和检查人员期望关键参数使用日语标注，仅有中文的铭牌在采购中可能不被接受。(2) 效率等级表示方式——GB 18613-2020 采用 1/2/3 级（能效等级）表示，而日本按 JIS C 4034-30 使用 IE1/IE2/IE3；面向日本的铭牌或文件应标注 IE 等级而非 GB 等级，或提供明确的交叉参照。(3) 频率——日本东部使用 50 Hz，西部使用 60 Hz；铭牌须正确标注额定频率；面向中国市场的国产电机通常仅为 50 Hz，双频或 60 Hz 变体须针对西日本进行单独验证。(4) 无能效标签——日本不要求电机贴附部分其他市场（欧盟、澳大利亚）规定的面向消费者的能效标签；技术文件即可满足要求。
gap.zht: GB 755 與 JIS C 4034-1 的銘牌技術內容高度一致（均源自 IEC 60034-1）。主要實際差距在於：(1) 語言——日本銘牌通常以日語顯示資訊；儘管 JIS C 4034-1 未強制規定特定語言，但日本買家和檢查人員期望關鍵參數使用日語標注，僅有中文的銘牌在採購中可能不被接受。(2) 效率等級表示方式——GB 18613-2020 採用 1/2/3 級（能效等級）表示，而日本按 JIS C 4034-30 使用 IE1/IE2/IE3；面向日本的銘牌或文件應標注 IE 等級而非 GB 等級，或提供明確的交叉參照。(3) 頻率——日本東部使用 50 Hz，西部使用 60 Hz；銘牌須正確標注額定頻率；面向中國市場的國產電機通常僅為 50 Hz，雙頻或 60 Hz 變體須針對西日本進行單獨驗證。(4) 無能效標籤——日本不要求電機貼附部分其他市場（歐盟、澳大利亞）規定的面向消費者的能效標籤；技術文件即可滿足要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — JIS C 4034-1 nameplate information is required by market convention and technical specification; IE class marking for Top Runner compliance documentation is mandatory under 省エネ法. No mandatory consumer-facing energy label for industrial motors.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 755-2019 nameplate requirements and GB 18613-2020 energy efficiency grade marking on nameplate

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), METI Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with GB 755-compliant nameplates are close to meeting JIS C 4034-1 nameplate requirements, but exporters must: (1) provide Japanese-language labelling or bilingual (Chinese/Japanese) nameplates for Japan market products; (2) express efficiency class as IE2/IE3 (JIS C 4034-30 notation) rather than GB grade 2/3; (3) verify and correctly state rated frequency, including whether motors are suitable for 60 Hz operation in western Japan. No separate consumer energy label is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合 GB 755 铭牌要求的中国电机接近满足 JIS C 4034-1 铭牌要求，但出口商须：(1) 为日本市场产品提供日语或双语（中/日）铭牌；(2) 以 IE2/IE3（JIS C 4034-30 表示方式）而非 GB 2/3 级来标注效率等级；(3) 核验并正确标注额定频率，包括电机是否适用于西日本 60 Hz 运行。无需单独的消费者能效标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合 GB 755 銘牌要求的中國電機接近滿足 JIS C 4034-1 銘牌要求，但出口商須：(1) 為日本市場產品提供日語或雙語（中/日）銘牌；(2) 以 IE2/IE3（JIS C 4034-30 表示方式）而非 GB 2/3 級來標注效率等級；(3) 核驗並正確標注額定頻率，包括電機是否適用於西日本 60 Hz 運行。無需單獨的消費者能效標籤。

requirement_topic.en: Top Runner annual reporting duty — importer's energy performance submission to ANRE
requirement_topic.zh: 领跑者年度报告义务 — 进口商向 ANRE 提交能效报告
requirement_topic.zht: 領跑者年度申報義務 — 進口商向 ANRE 提交能效申報

summary.en: Under the Act on Rationalizing Energy Use (省エネ法), Specified Import Businesses importing Top Runner designated motors must submit an annual report to the Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE) detailing the energy efficiency performance of imported models and demonstrating compliance with Top Runner target values. The report must cover model names, rated output, efficiency values (per JIS C 4034-2-1 test method), and aggregated import volumes. ANRE reviews submissions and may issue an improvement order (勧告) or publish non-compliant entity names if targets are missed. This reporting cycle is an ongoing annual obligation, not a one-time pre-market approval.
summary.zh: 依据《节能法》（省エネ法），进口领跑者指定电机的「特定输入业者」须每年向资源能源厅（ANRE）提交报告，详述进口型号的能效表现并证明符合领跑者目标值。报告须包含型号名称、额定输出、效率值（依据 JIS C 4034-2-1 测试方法）及进口量汇总。ANRE 审核提交内容，如未达标可发出整改勧告，或公开披露不合规主体名称。此报告周期为持续性年度义务，而非一次性市场前审批。
summary.zht: 依據《節能法》（省エネ法），進口領跑者指定電機的「特定輸入業者」須每年向資源能源廳（ANRE）提交申報，詳述進口型號的能效表現並證明符合領跑者目標值。申報須包含型號名稱、額定輸出、效率值（依據 JIS C 4034-2-1 測試方法）及進口量彙總。ANRE 審核提交內容，如未達標可發出整改勧告，或公開披露不合規主體名稱。此申報週期為持續性年度義務，而非一次性市場前審批。

standards_or_laws: Act on Rationalizing Energy Use (省エネ法, Law No. 49 of 1979, as amended) — Chapter IV Specified Import Business provisions
ANRE Top Runner Program administrative instructions for motors

summary.en: China has no equivalent annual energy-efficiency reporting obligation for motor importers or manufacturers. Compliance with GB 18613-2020 is enforced through product quality supervision by SAMR, not through an ongoing self-reporting duty. The energy-efficiency labelling scheme (节能产品认证, administered by CQC) is voluntary.
summary.zh: 中国对电机进口商或制造商无对应的年度能效报告义务。GB 18613-2020 合规由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过产品质量监督实施，而非持续性自我报告义务。节能产品认证（由 CQC 主管）为自愿性质。
summary.zht: 中國對電機進口商或製造商無對應的年度能效申報義務。GB 18613-2020 合規由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過產品質量監督實施，而非持續性自我申報義務。節能產品認證（由 CQC 主管）為自願性質。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (enforcement by SAMR — no equivalent annual reporting duty)
节能产品认证 (CQC voluntary energy-saving product certification — voluntary)

gap.en: The annual reporting obligation under 省エネ法 is a structural gap with no Chinese counterpart. Chinese exporters must supply their Japanese importer with: (1) efficiency test reports under JIS C 4034-2-1 for each model; (2) model specifications and rated output data; (3) timely updates if product specifications change. Failure to provide documentation may prevent the importer from completing its annual ANRE submission, creating a supply chain compliance risk. Exporters should build this documentation supply into their Japan sales agreements.
gap.zh: 省エネ法项下的年度报告义务是一项无中国对应规定的结构性差距。中国出口商须向日本进口商提供：(1) 每个型号依据 JIS C 4034-2-1 的效率测试报告；(2) 型号规格及额定输出数据；(3) 产品规格变更时的及时更新。若未能提供文件，可能导致进口商无法完成年度 ANRE 申报，从而形成供应链合规风险。出口商应将此文件供应义务纳入日本销售协议中。
gap.zht: 省エネ法項下的年度申報義務是一項無中國對應規定的結構性差距。中國出口商須向日本進口商提供：(1) 每個型號依據 JIS C 4034-2-1 的效率測試報告；(2) 型號規格及額定輸出數據；(3) 產品規格變更時的及時更新。若未能提供文件，可能導致進口商無法完成年度 ANRE 申報，從而形成供應鏈合規風險。出口商應將此文件供應義務納入日本銷售協議中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — annual ANRE reporting is a legal obligation for Specified Import Businesses under 省エネ法; non-compliance can result in improvement orders and public disclosure
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent annual energy-efficiency reporting duty for motor manufacturers or importers in China

source.publisher: Agency for Natural Resources and Energy (ANRE), METI Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The annual Top Runner reporting obligation is a mandatory ongoing compliance burden unique to Japan that Chinese exporters must accommodate in their supply chain agreements. Exporters should ensure JIS C 4034-2-1 test reports are prepared for each motor model and made available to their Japanese importer for ANRE annual submissions. This requirement has no counterpart in Chinese domestic motor regulations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 年度领跑者报告义务是日本特有的持续性强制合规负担，中国出口商须在供应链协议中予以安排。出口商应确保每个电机型号均备有 JIS C 4034-2-1 测试报告，并提供给日本进口商用于 ANRE 年度申报。该要求在中国国内电机法规中无对应规定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 年度領跑者申報義務是日本特有的持續性強制合規負擔，中國出口商須在供應鏈協議中予以安排。出口商應確保每個電機型號均備有 JIS C 4034-2-1 測試報告，並提供給日本進口商用於 ANRE 年度申報。該要求在中國國內電機法規中無對應規定。
